title: CTOV - PneumaticCraft: Repressurized compat
description: Compatibility datapack between CTOV and PneumaticCraft: Repressurized mod
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and PneumaticCraft: Repressurized compat. You will find worksites in villages. 1.19+ datapack is for both Forge and Fabric.

**PneumaticCraft: Repressurized mod**

PneumaticCraft: Repressurized mod can be obtained [here](hhttps://modrinth.com/mod/pneumaticcraft-repressurized)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
